title: Deterministic Tests, Fault Injection, Contract Evidence, and Observability · Go Client Systems · Stakeholder Go Mission
summary: A platform reliability team. Go SDK maintainers need a reusable client and fault harness that tests transport seams, middleware order, typed operations, privacy-safe telemetry, and rotating configuration. Planned artifact: Deliver Observable Go Service SDK and Fault Harness with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inject the narrow request execution capability needed for deterministic tests without cloning the whole HTTP library. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inject cancellation, timeout, reset, partial body, malformed fields, bad media type, redirect, and retry exhaustion deterministically. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Minimize outbound data and authority and redact credentials, personal data, URLs, and bodies from logs and errors. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
